articles.author: Lorne Cook, Karel Janicek
articles.title: Russian oil to Slovakia resumes flowing through pipeline that crosses Ukraine - AP News
articles.description: The European Union has approved a massive loan package to help Ukraine meet its economic and military needs for the next two years. This decision comes after Hungary lifted its veto. The EU also approved new sanctions against Russia over its war on Ukraine. H…
articles.content: BRUSSELS (AP) The European Union on Thursday approved a massive loan package to help Ukraine meet its economic and military needs for the next two years, the blocs Cypriot presidency said, after Hung… [+3547 chars]
